name: Egg Cream
recipeIngredient: Seltzer or club soda - very cold
recipeInstructions: An egg cream is made with very cold seltzer or club soda, U-bet chocolate syrup and ice cold milk. Start by putting about 1 to 1-1/2 inches milk in a tall glass. Add about the same amount of chocolate syrup. Add the seltzer and mix vigorously until the ingredients are combined. If done correctly, there will be about 2 inches of white cream at the top of the glass. An egg cream is never taken through a straw. You should always drink it from the glass!
